title: EUDR Due Diligence
geo.title: Plot Geolocation
geo.subtitle: Provide coordinates of the production/harvest plot to verify origin.
geo.mismatchWarning: Warning: Plot country does not match the trade origin country ({{originIso2}}).
evidence.title: Deforestation-free Evidence
evidence.subtitle: Provide evidence that the commodity was produced on land not subject to deforestation after 31 December 2020.
evidence.referencePlaceholder: e.g. FSC-C123456 or imagery dataset ID
evidence.dateWarning: Warning: Evidence date must be after 31 December 2020 (EUDR cutoff).
supplier.title: Supplier Verification
supplier.subtitle: Identify the supplier and confirm sanctions screening has been performed.
supplier.name: Supplier name
supplier.sanctionsConfirm: I confirm that I have screened this supplier against applicable sanctions lists (EU, UN, OFAC) and the supplier is not subject to any sanctions.
risk.subtitleComplete: Your EUDR due diligence statement has been generated and recorded.
risk.subtitleAssess: Assess the overall risk level for this trade and generate your due diligence statement.
risk.highReasonLabel: Reason for high risk (required for high risk)
risk.highReasonPlaceholder: Explain the reason for the high-risk assessment and any mitigating measures taken…
summary.title: Summary
